text.title: Google Ads Reporting Dashboards Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: build-three-views
step.action: Operator weekly + executive monthly + stakeholder summary.

step.name: wire-alerts
step.action: Configure 4 standard thresholds; route to Slack/email.

step.name: make-segments-default
step.action: Embed device / network / location / time / audience breakdowns in every view.

step.name: embed-action-queue
step.action: Force a top-5 action queue at end of every report.
